displayNameZh: 更快做出来，品质门槛也跟着提高
summary: Yt Faster Higher Quality component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「更快做出来，品质门槛也跟着提高」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-faster-higher-quality/src/YtFasterHigherQuality.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtFasterHigherQuality` and `ytFasterHigherQualityDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Faster Higher Quality Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-faster-higher-quality to my project. Preserve the exported YtFasterHigherQualityProps API and register the YtFasterHigherQuality composition with the default props.
